text:
Created attachment 202665
tzdiff-1.1.patch

Tzdiff has been updated to 1.1.
New options -HH and -N has been added in this version.
See the github repository for detail.

https://github.com/belgianbeer/tzdiff

The attached `tzdiff-1.1.patch` upgrades misc/tzdiff port.
Please apply it to Ports tree.
